examples: This restaurant is affordable and delicious.
The new phone is surprisingly affordable.
context: Wow. I am in the produce section which is where they sell fruits and vegetables and I can't believe how cheap and affordable everything is especially compared to the grocery stores in Korea.

examples: The bread is soft and chewy.
context: They have party trays of fruit with a big caramel dip in the middle. This is maybe very American because we have the healthy fruit but then we like to dip it in caramel and make it a sugary dessert. I would devour this. I am truly American at heart. Wow. The sheer amount of different ice cream flavors they have is astounding. They have Kit Kat ice cream bars, Reese's ice cream bars, any flavor you could ever imagine is here. Eminem ice cream sandwiches and even gummy worm flavored ice cream. This is the first time I've ever seen this. It says it has a chewy gummy texture. I'm intrigued. I kind of want to buy this. They have cheesy bacon flavored ice cream for your dog. This is peak weird American grocery items. Something else that gives me reverse culture shock when I come back to the US is the portion size of different foods and grocery items here. Who needs this much chocolate ice cream? If you buy this I hope you have like seven kids off. I guess it's good for parties. Holy moly. I can barely pick it up. This thing is a weapon.

Bob's pickle pops. These are dill pickle flavored popsicles. It says they're made with 100% dill pickle juice and the way they market it is hilarious. It says sport. So they're trying to sell this to athletes. I'm a huge pickle lover and I even drink pickle juice by itself sometimes.

examples: The cake has a soft, fluffy texture.
I love the crunchy texture of fried chicken.
The texture of this fabric is so smooth.
